articles.title: US and Iran 'very close' to deal but 'not there yet', Vance says
articles.description: US officials earlier told the BBC that the framework of a ceasefire extension deal had been agreed, pending the approval of Trump and Iran's leadership.

articles.title: Moment Blue Origin rocket explodes during test in Florida
articles.description: A Blue Origin New Glenn rocket exploded on a launch pad at Cape Canaveral in Florida on Thursday night.

articles.title: SAS troops accused of war crimes not referred to police over morale fears, inquiry hears
articles.description: This meant military police did not learn for years of allegations of extra-judicial killings.

articles.title: Top UK chefs call for 10% VAT cut for pubs and restaurants
articles.description: Tom Kerridge, Yotam Ottolenghi, Ravneet Gill and Simon Rogan told BBC Newsnight VAT should be slashed to 10% to ease mounting pressure on the hospitality industry.
